subject: [RFC PATCH v2 4/7] mm, swap: only charge physical swap entries

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch modifies the way memory cgroups (memcgs) charge swap usage to only count physical swap entries, rather than virtual ones. This change is made by deferring the memcg->swap charge for vswap entries until physical backing is allocated. The patch splits the lifecycle of vswap into four operations: recording the memcg private ID at allocation without charging, charging memcg->swap when physical backing is allocated, uncharging in __vswap_release_backing, and dropping the ID ref at __swap_cluster_free_entries. This change aims to make memcg->swap reflect actual on-disk swap usage rather than virtual swap reservations.
